About SABRI

Our Story & Mission

Revolutionizing agriculture by combining modern and traditional methods, fostering a new era of farming excellence.

🎯

Our Mission

To revolutionize agriculture by combining modern and traditional methods, fostering a new era of farming excellence.

🔭

Our Vision

Build a sustainable ecosystem for farmer profitability and optimal crop quality for all stakeholders.

🌿

Our Focus

Specializing in vegetables, spices, and mushrooms through tech-enabled, forward-thinking farming models.

The Problem

Challenges We Address

Indian agriculture faces critical hurdles impacting both farmers and consumers.

📉

Limited Market Access

Farmers struggle with direct access to markets, leading to significantly lower profits and dependency on middlemen.

📦

Supply Chain Gaps

Retailers face unpredictable supply and variable quality due to inconsistent logistics and storage infrastructure.

🗑️

Significant Waste

Up to 30% of perishable produce is wasted annually due to poor logistics, costing billions in lost value.

Opportunity

India's Agri-Market Potential

A remarkable opportunity for innovation and growth in one of the world's largest agricultural markets.

₹40L Cr
Market Size (2024)
8%
CAGR Growth Rate
1.4B
Population to Feed
Digital
Farm-to-Market Connect
Roadmap

Strategic Growth Plan

Our phased approach to transforming the agricultural supply chain.

Phase 1 — Exotic & Non-Exotic Vegetables

Establishing a strong foundation with high-demand fresh produce, ensuring quality and consistent supply to our partners.

Phase 2 — Grains & Pulses

Expanding our portfolio to include staple grains and pulses, broadening our market reach and farmer network.

Phase 3 — Processed Foods with FPO Partnerships

Venturing into value-added processed foods, leveraging Farmer Producer Organization (FPO) partnerships for greater impact and higher farmer profitability.

Credentials

Certifications & Recognition

SABRI is a recognized and compliant entity, registered with Government of India bodies.

🏆

DPIIT Recognition

Certificate of Recognition from the Department for Promotion of Industry & Internal Trade.

📜

MCA Registration

Registered under the Ministry of Corporate Affairs, Government of India.

✅

Income Tax Compliant

Fully compliant with Income Tax regulations, Government of India.

Business Model

Sustainable Revenue Streams

A transparent and scalable model built for long-term profitability.

💰

Commission per Transaction

A percentage from each successful B2B sale, ensuring our growth is directly tied to farmer success.

📋

Bulk Buyer Subscriptions

Premium access and benefits for high-volume purchasers with priority supply chain access.

📦

Value-Added Services

Packaging, branding, and processing support to enhance product appeal and farmer income.

Transparent Pricing Example

Farmer sells @ ₹80/kg → Buyer purchases @ ₹100/kg → Our margin: ₹10-15/kg

Partners

Our Trade Network

🛒 Modern Trade

Connecting farmers to leading online and offline retailers:

Amazon Fresh Zepto Zomato BigBasket Flipkart Minutes

🏪 General Trade

Complementing modern trade with a robust presence in traditional local markets:

Omfresh Vegies Dipak Vegetable Rahul Vegetables Local Vendors
